description_long: This police station is a medium-sized public building set into a blocky, angular urban landscape, with a prominent two-story structure featuring a reddish-brown gabled roof and a light-colored facade. The main entrance is marked by a set of double doors and a small overhang, flanked by large windows that provide visibility into the interior. The building is surrounded by geometric, abstracted forms representing adjacent structures or terrain, which are rendered in shades of gray and black. The police station itself has a symmetrical front with a central bay window and a balcony above the entrance, giving it a formal and approachable appearance. The windows are regularly spaced and the facade is simple, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing functionality. No police-specific signage or vehicles are visible, and the exterior is free of obvious security cameras or overt security features.
description: A two-story police station with a reddish-brown gabled roof, light facade, and symmetrical front, set among angular gray urban forms. The building features large windows, a central entrance, and a balcony above the doorway.
description_view_0: The police station is seen from an elevated angle, showing the front facade with its central entrance, bay window, and balcony, surrounded by angular gray structures.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the length of the building, the gabled roof, and the arrangement of windows along the facade, with the entrance partially visible.
description_view_2: A direct front view emphasizes the symmetrical design, central bay window, balcony, and main entrance, with the building framed by the surrounding gray forms.
description_view_3: The rear and side of the building are visible, showing the continuation of the roof and the less-detailed back facade, with the angular urban context more prominent.
attribute_building_facade_features: Symmetrical front with central bay window, balcony above main entrance, large rectangular windows, double entrance doors, gabled roof, minimal decorative elements.
